greeting.text: Bring me your gear and a little arcane dust, and I'll bind a rune of power into it that will never fade.

responses.text: Where do I find arcane dust?

enchant.text: Hold a weapon or piece of armour and type ENCHANT here, then name the item and the rune. Each piece can bear a single rune, so choose it well.

responses.text: Where do I find arcane dust?

dust.text: Arcane dust clings to the bones of the restless dead. Put the skeletons in the ossuary to rest and gather what settles.
